The '''Victory Forum''' was an arena building in the [[City/Legends|town]] of [[Death (town)|Death]], then known as ''Dying Slowly'', on [[Jubilar/Legends|Jubilar]] around [[12 BBY/Legends|12 BBY]]. It was named by the winning side of one the planet's numerous wars. It was brightly lit and had hundreds of rows of seats which allowed for up to 20,000 to view barbaric sporting events.<ref name="The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> It hosted the ''[[Regional Sector Number Four's All-Human Free-For-All]]'' venue.

By [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]] the area surrounding the structure had become derelict slums, while the Forum itself was an open mass of rubble.

{{Struct-stub}}
